flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Highline College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Highline College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Highline College fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.6k → $9.5k).
